g.text: INTERNAL — invisible to core AND Driver
(the work product: code / tests / config / infra
the Driver never reads orchestrator prose;
the orchestrator never calls back into the Driver.
Self-contained: prose / prompts / store / loop PRIVATE.
Interactive dialogue is orchestrator-owned via its own
If LLM-driven without its own runtime, it shells a model
CLI as a subprocess — depends on "a model is invokable",
NOT on the Driver. Ledger/Loop/Dispatcher is internal
decomposition guidance, never core contract surface.
Doctor is NOT privileged: config-named and overridable
like any other spec-side CLI. Its entire cross-boundary
job is CLI callability. Core never sees work-items,
